name: omnilink
description: A cross-platform desktop console for connecting AI workflows on macOS and Windows.

scripts.check: node --check src/main/main.js && node --check src/main/preload.js && node --check src/main/services/paths.js && node --check src/main/services/config-store.js && node --check src/main/services/log-store.js && node --check src/main/services/conversation-store.js && node --check src/main/services/runtime-manager.js && node --check src/runtime/mock-relay.js && node --check src/renderer/app.js
